In a small container, rehydrate SDT in hot tea water for ~15 minutes, or until soft
Remove from water and pat dry
In a saute pan, sweat the garlic and onions then add the bell peppers
Deglaze with Mother #2, then add cilantro
Blend Tomatoes, cooked onion mixture, spices, and salt on high
Slowly add EVOO to emulsify
Ice bath in batches while blending. Critical to cool as soon as possible to maintain bright red orange color.
After all is blended, continue chilling over ice bath until everything is cooled.
Reserve in quart containers in the cooler.
